mapper.update: UPDATE RECALL_MISSING SET deleted_dt = NOW() WHERE missing_no = #{missingNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT missing_no AS missingNo , name AS name , age AS age , area AS area , gender AS gender , img AS img , status AS status , date AS date FROM RECALL_MISSING WHERE deleted_dt IS NULL

SELECT missing_no AS missingNo , name AS name , age AS age , area AS area , gender AS gender , img AS img , status AS status , date AS date FROM RECALL_MISSING WHERE missing_no = #{missingNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL

SELECT missing_no AS missingNo , name AS name , age AS age , area AS area , gender AS gender , img AS img , status AS status , date AS date FROM RECALL_MISSING
AND deleted_dt IS NULL
AND ( area = #{keywords} OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )
